description: 160 - 01-04-2025 - Emails between Peter Mandelson, Jonathan Powell (National Security Adviser, CO) and others
text:
Security Adviser, CO) and others

From: Jonathan Powell Personal
Sent: Tue 01/04/2025 11:58:43 AM (UTC)
To: Peter Mandelson Personal
Ce: JCS JCS
Subject: Re: ***
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

Yes we are making sure that happens. Matt Collins and his team are doing it.

From: Peter Mandelson

Peter

parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.

messages.body: Yes we are making sure that happens. Matt Collins and his team are doing it.

Thanks
Peter
